title: Isolation of infectious Theileria parva sporozoites from infected ticks
author: Vimonish, Rubikah
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: Fig. 2 Infected R. appendiculatus adult ticks feeding on a silicone membrane. a A representation of adult ticks attached to a silicone membrane. b Detection of tick salivary gland infected with T. parva via p104 PCR. Amplicons were visualized in 2% agarose gel
